overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing a character walking through a sunny Los Santos neighborhood. The character traverses sidewalks, crosses streets, passes the distinctive Hayes Autos building, and crosses a railroad crossing as a train passes by.

events.description: character steps off curb and crosses the street at the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk then crossing the street at the marked intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

entered.detail: row of tall palm trees lining the sidewalk with textured trunks
metal chain-link fence running along the right side of the walkway
tall multi-story residential building with vertical windows
red octagonal stop sign mounted on pole at the intersection
white pickup truck parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a palm-lined residential sidewalk bordered by a chain-link fence, approaching a street intersection marked by a red stop sign. The character crosses the street, passing a parked white pickup truck and encountering a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial boulevard with auto repair shop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past commercial buildings and palm trees

entered.detail: red commercial building with large white HAYES AUTOS signage on the side
ornate black vintage-style street lamps along the sidewalk
small residential houses with front yards and driveways

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the sunlit boulevard, passing the distinctive red Hayes Autos building on the right. Vintage street lamps line the path while single-family homes appear across the street, and the palm trees recede into the mid-ground.

events.description: approaching railroad crossing with warning gates and tracks visible ahead
character crosses the railroad tracks at the marked crossing

agents.ego_description: approaching and crossing the railroad tracks at the intersection, navigating around the crossing gates

notable_agents.action: NPC character standing near the railroad crossing waiting

entered.detail: metal railroad tracks embedded in the asphalt road surface
red and white striped crossing barrier gates on both sides
flashing red warning lights mounted on poles at the crossing
single-story beige commercial building with flat roof

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a railroad crossing with visible tracks, crossing gates, and warning lights. An NPC stands near the crossing as the character walks across the tracks, transitioning from the commercial area into a more open intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: active railroad crossing with passing train

events.description: yellow train locomotive approaches and passes through the crossing from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection while observing the train passing through the railroad crossing

entered.detail: large yellow and black train engine moving through the crossing

segments.scene_description: A large yellow locomotive train enters the scene from the right, passing through the railroad crossing as the character continues across the intersection. The train moves across the field of view, temporarily obscuring the crossing gates behind it.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny residential neighborhood that transitions from a quiet sidewalk into a bustling railroad crossing. It begins with the character walking along a palm-lined sidewalk bordered by a chain-link fence before crossing a street past a parked white pickup truck and an oncoming pedestrian. As the character continues along the sunlit boulevard, the scene shifts past the red Hayes Autos building and vintage street lamps, with residential homes appearing across the way. The path then leads toward a railroad crossing where the character passes a waiting NPC and walks across the tracks, moving from the commercial strip into an open intersection. Finally, a large yellow locomotive enters from the right and thunders across the field of view, temporarily obscuring the crossing gates as the character completes the crossing.
